description: Paragliding XC weather monitor — scores flying conditions for configured sites using Open-Meteo data, shows a 7-day forecast dashboard, and tracks notification preferences.

userStories.title: Project Foundation & Layout
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the app shell and layout set up so I have a solid foundation to build on.
acceptanceCriteria: App has a responsive layout with header (logo/title SoarCast), sidebar navigation, and main content area
Navigation includes: Dashboard, Sites, Settings
Dark mode support via shadcn theme toggle
Mobile-responsive (sidebar collapses to hamburger menu)
TypeScript strict mode enabled in tsconfig
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use shadcn sidebar, button, and sheet components. Install next-themes for dark mode.

userStories.title: JSON File Storage Layer
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a simple JSON file storage utility so the app can persist data without a database.
acceptanceCriteria: Utility module at src/lib/storage.ts with read/write/update functions for JSON files
Data stored in data/ directory at project root
Type-safe generic functions that accept TypeScript types
Handles concurrent reads safely with read-modify-write pattern
Stores: sites.json, forecasts.json, settings.json
TypeScript interfaces defined for all data shapes in src/types/index.ts
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use fs/promises. Keep it simple — JSON.parse/stringify with proper error handling.

userStories.title: Site Management
userStories.description: As a user, I want to add and manage my flying sites so I can track conditions at places I fly.
acceptanceCriteria: Sites page at /sites listing all configured sites in a card grid
Add Site dialog with form: name, latitude, longitude, elevation (m), ideal wind directions (multi-select compass), max wind speed (km/h), notes
Edit and delete functionality for existing sites
Form validation with error messages
Sites persisted to data/sites.json via server actions
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use shadcn card, dialog, form, input, select, and button components.

userStories.title: Weather Data Fetching
userStories.description: As the system, I want to fetch weather forecast data from Open-Meteo so I can analyze flying conditions.
acceptanceCriteria: Service module at src/lib/weather.ts fetching from Open-Meteo API
Fetches 7-day hourly forecast including: temperature, wind speed, wind direction, wind gusts, cloud cover, CAPE, precipitation probability, pressure
Also fetches model elevation and sunrise/sunset times
Results cached in data/forecasts.json keyed by site ID + fetch date
Cache expires after 6 hours
Error handling for API failures
TypeScript types for API response and internal forecast model
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Open-Meteo forecast API: https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast. No API key needed. Use hourly params: temperature_2m,wind_speed_10m,wind_direction_10m,wind_gusts_10m,cloud_cover,cape,precipitation_probability,pressure_msl

userStories.title: XC Soaring Score Algorithm
userStories.description: As a user, I want each day scored for XC potential so I can quickly see which days look good.
acceptanceCriteria: Scoring module at src/lib/scoring.ts
Analyzes hourly weather data for flyable window 10:00-17:00 local time
Scoring factors: CAPE/thermal strength 30%, wind speed vs site max 25%, wind direction match 20%, cloud cover 15%, precipitation probability 10%
Overall score 0-100 with labels: Poor (0-30), Fair (31-50), Good (51-70), Great (71-85), Epic (86-100)
Returns per-day score with overall score, label, and factor breakdown
Handles missing data gracefully
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Higher CAPE = stronger thermals = better score. Wind below site max is good. Wind matching ideal directions is good. Low cloud cover and low precip probability are good.

userStories.title: Dashboard — Forecast Overview
userStories.description: As a user, I want a dashboard showing the next 7 days of forecasts for all my sites so I can plan my flying.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard page at / showing grid: rows = sites, columns = next 7 days
Each cell shows XC score 0-100 with color coding (red to yellow to green)
Clicking a cell opens detail dialog with score breakdown and hourly data
Refresh forecasts button that re-fetches for all sites
Auto-fetches on page load if data stale (>6 hours)
Empty state when no sites configured with prompt to add sites
Loading states while fetching
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Use shadcn table, dialog, badge, and skeleton components.

userStories.title: Site Detail Page
userStories.description: As a user, I want detailed forecasts for a specific site so I can analyze conditions in depth.
acceptanceCriteria: Site detail page at /sites/[id] showing site info and 7-day forecast
Daily cards with score badge, wind speed/direction, CAPE, cloud cover, precip %, temperature range
Hourly timeline for selected day showing wind speed and CAPE
Visual wind direction indicator
Back navigation to sites list
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Keep charts simple — can use a basic SVG or CSS-based bar chart. No need for heavy chart libraries.

userStories.title: Settings & Notifications Config
userStories.description: As a user, I want to configure notification preferences so I get alerted about good flying days.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings page at /settings with notification preferences
Configurable minimum score threshold for alerts (default 70)
Configurable notification window in days ahead (default 2)
Toggle notifications per site
Settings persisted to data/settings.json
Show notification would fire indicator on dashboard for qualifying days
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Actual notification delivery is out of scope for v1. Just store preferences and show visual indicators.

userStories.title: Seed Data & Polish
userStories.description: As a user, I want example sites pre-loaded so I can see the app in action immediately.
acceptanceCriteria: Default seed data with 3 PNW sites: Tiger Mountain (47.4829, -121.9410, 460m), Dog Mountain (45.6996, -121.7073, 701m), Chelan Butte (47.8282, -120.0164, 390m)
App has favicon and meta tags (title SoarCast, description Paragliding XC forecast monitor)
Loading/error boundaries for all pages
Styled 404 page
README.md updated with project description, setup, and deployment notes
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Seed data should load on first run if sites.json is empty or missing.
